name: writing-style-catalog
description: Composable writing instructions on four orthogonal axes: Voice (persistent writer identity), Tone (situational register), Style (rhetorical and cognitive pattern), and Format (output structure). Select one entry per axis and the compose-instruction skill assembles a ready-to-paste prompt prefix that steers any LLM toward a precise register, reasoning pattern, and layout. v0.1.0 ships 60 curated entries (15 per axis), 195 worked examples across three anchor topics, 12 diff-pairs, and 5 horizontal-slice recipes. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
